nasb.text: The Lord also thundered in the heavens, And the Most High uttered His voice, Hailstones and coals of fire.

esv.text: The Lord also thundered in the heavens, and the Most High uttered his voice, hailstones and coals of fire.

cnv.text: 耶和華在天上打雷， 至高者發出聲音， 發出冰雹和火炭。

ccb.text: 耶和华在天上打雷， 至高者发出的声音响彻在冰雹和火炭中。

csbs.text: 耶和华在天上发出雷鸣， 至高者发出他的声音，伴随着冰雹和火炭；
